title: What teeth enamel tells us about ancient human diets
description: The enamel on our teeth is the hardest tissue on the human body. A new study looks at the nanoscale structure of enamel from teeth dating as far back as 18 million years ago to see how it's changed.

title: What teeth enamel tells us about ancient human diets - NPR
description: What teeth enamel tells us about ancient human diets NPR Enamel nanocrystal misorientation increased with meat-eating and agriculture Nature Ancient teeth reveal rainforest people laid the groundwork for farming long before crops existed Earth.com Hominin Tooth Enamel Nanostructure Evolved to Accommodate Dietary Shifts to Tougher Foods geneonline.com Detailed molecular picture of tooth enamel reveals adaptations to diet Phys.org

title: 120-Million-Year-Old Fossil in China Reveals New Four-Winged Creatures That Hunted Birds
description: New fossil reveals a bird-hunting, four-winged microraptor that expands scientists' understanding of dinosaur flight evolution.

title: Discovering the ancient stone jars of Laos ... and their creepy secret
description: Visiting Laos's Plain of Jars — and discovering why an Australian archaeologist's new find makes these ancient stone monuments even more fascinating.
